channel.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
channel.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

image.title: Al Jazeera – Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera
image.description: Breaking News, World News and Video from Al Jazeera

item.title: IRGC doubles down as Iran-US MoU jeopardised by Hormuz strikes
item.description: Markets in Iran react poorly after two nights of military confrontations over transit through the critical strait.

item.title: The US-Iran MoU: A mirage of an agreement
item.description: Both Washington and Tehran know that current deal will not lead to lasting peace. It is merely a strategic pause

item.title: Ukraine says it attacked two Russian oil refineries
item.description: At least two killed in drone attacks, Russian authorities say, as Ukraine continues to target energy facilities.

item.title: Adam Johnson on how US corporate media sold Israel’s genocide in Gaza
item.description: Marc Lamont Hill speaks with author Adam Johnson on US corporate media’s role in enabling the genocide in Gaza.

item.title: Stories of survivors of Venezuela’s earthquakes
item.description: Rescuers in Venezuela are racing against time to find survivors after twin earthquakes left thousands missing.

item.title: Paradise lost: How Israel is making war on West Bank farmers
item.description: Israel is attacking West Bank agriculture in an attempt to drive Palestinian farmers off their land.

item.title: What is Article 5 of Iran-US MoU, and why is it blamed for Hormuz strikes?
item.description: Iran and the US trade attacks over navigation through the Strait of Hormuz, which has emerged as a major sticking point.

item.title: Araghchi: Strait of Hormuz remains under Iranian control for 30 days
item.description: Iran’s foreign minister has urged ‘all parties not to interfere’ in the management of the Strait of Hormuz.

item.title: Satellite images show scale of destruction in Venezuela earthquakes
item.description: Satellite images show the before and after of parts of Venezuela left in ruins by two devastating quakes.

item.title: ‘Digging with a needle’: Generals stall peace as Sudan’s el-Obeid burns
item.description: The battle for el-Obeid exposes the foreign arms and polarised narratives stalling peace in Sudan’s grinding war.

item.title: US strikes Iran for second day: Is it a violation of war powers resolution?
item.description: Days after Congress tells Trump he needs to seek its approval or end Iran war, Trump returns to attacks. Is it legal?

item.title: Saudi Aramco helicopter crash in Ras Tanura kills all 14 on board
item.description: The helicopter crashed in Saudi Arabia's Ras Tanura terminal, state media reported.

item.title: At least 11 dead as skydiving plane crashes in France
item.description: Authorities say pilot and all 10 ⁠passengers - ​five students ⁠and five instructors - died in the accident in Tomblaine.

item.title: World Cup 2026: Most controversial VAR officiating decisions in group stage
item.description: From Iran's stoppage-time winner ruled out by VAR, to Ghana denied a penalty against England - all the controversies.

item.title: Uganda’s military chief orders shutdown of two media outlets
item.description: The president's son said he did not believe in a free press as military personnel were deployed to the media offices.

item.title: ‘US trying to find its way out of MoU with Iran’
item.description: Bahrain and Kuwait have condemned Iran’s retaliatory attacks after a second day of US strikes on Iran.

item.title: Iraq security forces arrest several officials in anticorruption crackdown
item.description: Large-scale operation carried out at dawn in Green Zone and several neighbourhoods in Baghdad, security source says.

item.title: FIFA World Cup: Round of 32 bracket, schedule, predictions, Iran’s exit
item.description: Knockout matches begin with South Africa vs Canada as Iran exit, Africa make history, Messi-Ronaldo final hopes rise.

item.title: Iran attacks Kuwait and Bahrain in response to US strikes
item.description: US-Iran deal under strain as Kuwait and Bahrain condemn Iranian attacks in response to US strikes.

item.title: Watch World Cup Day 17: Messi breaks record as Algeria and DR Congo advance
item.description: Latest match highlights, reaction and previews from the FIFA World Cup 2026 in North America.

item.title: South Africa vs Canada: World Cup 2026 – prediction, team news and lineups
item.description: Neither South Africa nor Canada has reached the knockout rounds of a World Cup before, but now a last-16 place awaits.

item.title: DR Congo fans celebrate reaching World Cup knockout stage
item.description: DR Congo fans are celebrating after their team secured a historic place in the World Cup knockout stage.

item.title: ‘Between pain and fear’: Gaza children bear cost of ongoing Israeli attacks
item.description: Suffering of Gaza's children continues unabated due to Israeli attacks despite 'ceasefire' reached in October 2025.

item.title: Iran bow out of World Cup: Late drama ends Team Melli’s knockout dream
item.description: Austria's 3-3 draw with Algeria ultimately decides Iran's fate as Team Melli crash out of the 2026 World Cup.

item.title: Polls open in New Caledonia’s first provincial elections since 2019
item.description: The New Zealand public broadcaster reports that about 2,500 police officers were deployed to secure and monitor polling stations.
